info.title: Blipyy API
info.description: Blipyy trading journal and analytics API

bearerAuth.description: Enter a JWT access token or an API key (format: tt_live_xxx). API keys can be created under Profile > API Keys.

apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyAuth.description: Enter your API key (format: tt_live_xxx). API keys can be created under Profile > API Keys.

instrumentType.description: Type of instrument (also accepts instrument_type in snake_case)

underlyingSymbol.description: Underlying stock symbol for options (also accepts underlying_symbol)

strikePrice.description: Strike price for options (also accepts strike_price)

expirationDate.description: Expiration date for options (also accepts expiration_date)

contractSize.description: Contract size for options (defaults to 100) (also accepts contract_size)

underlyingAsset.description: Underlying asset for futures (also accepts underlying_asset)

contractMonth.description: Contract month for futures (also accepts contract_month)

contractYear.description: Contract year for futures (also accepts contract_year)

tickSize.description: Tick size for futures (also accepts tick_size)

pointValue.description: Point value for futures (also accepts point_value)

type.description: Type of health data. heartRate is accepted for backwards compatibility and stored as heart_rate.

value.description: Numeric value (hours for sleep, BPM for heart rate)

post.summary: Create a new AI analysis session

filters.description: Optional filters to apply to trade analysis

get.summary: Get session details with message history

post.summary: Send a follow-up question in an existing session

get.description: Returns paginated trades for the authenticated user. Deprecated - use GET /api/trades instead.

post.description: Creates a new trade. Deprecated - use POST /api/trades instead.

get.description: Returns a single trade. Deprecated - use GET /api/trades/{id} instead.

put.description: Updates an existing trade. Deprecated - use PUT /api/trades/{id} instead.

delete.description: Deletes a trade. Deprecated - use DELETE /api/trades/{id} instead.

get.description: Returns comprehensive trading analytics including total P&L, win rate, profit factor, average win/loss, best/worst trades, and streak data. Supports all trade filters.
Returns P&L performance grouped by daily, weekly, or monthly periods.
Returns daily P&L data for a calendar year heatmap visualization. Requires year parameter.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year to fetch calendar data for

200.description: Daily P&L data for calendar heatmap

get.description: Returns per-symbol trading statistics including P&L, trade count, and win rate.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of symbols to return

get.description: Returns formatted data for equity curve, P&L distribution, and other chart visualizations.

post.summary: Submit health data from mobile app
post.description: Uploads normalized health data from mobile or wearable integrations

get.description: Retrieves stored health data for the authenticated user

parameters.name: dataType
parameters.description: Filter by data type. heartRate is accepted as an alias for heart_rate.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

post.description: Analyzes correlations between health metrics and trading performance

startDate.description: Analysis start date (defaults to 30 days ago)

get.description: Retrieves AI-generated insights about health-trading correlations

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of insights to return

post.description: Updates trades table with health metrics from health_data table based on matching dates

get.summary: Get all instrument templates for the authenticated user

409.description: Template with this name already exists

get.summary: Get a single instrument template by ID
Get comprehensive news sentiment correlation analytics

overall_performance.description: Performance metrics by sentiment and side

timing_analysis.description: Timing patterns relative to news events

direction_bias.description: Long/short bias based on news sentiment

sentiment_accuracy.description: How well sentiment predictions align with outcomes

403.description: Feature not available for user tier

get.summary: Get news correlation summary for dashboard
Check if news correlation analytics is enabled
Get detailed trades and news for a specific performer combination

403.description: Feature not available for user tier

post.summary: Start news backfill for existing trades

userId.description: User ID to backfill (admin only, defaults to current user)

batchSize.description: Number of symbol/date combinations to process per batch

maxTrades.description: Maximum number of trades to process (for testing)

get.summary: Get cached news for a symbol and date

200.description: News data for the symbol and date

notify_news_open_positions.description: Notifications for news on open positions
Notifications for news on open positions

get.summary: Get notification preference definitions and descriptions
Check if specific notification preference is enabled
Get all tags for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns the total number of trades for the authenticated user, respecting any active filters.

post.description: Creates a trade with metadata only (symbol, side, strategy, etc.) but no entry/exit executions. Use POST /api/trades/{id}/fills to add executions incrementally after creation.

get.description: Export all trades matching the filter criteria to a CSV file with generic headers

post.summary: NUCLEAR OPTION - Force complete ALL enrichment jobs

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year for monthly breakdown (defaults to current year)

get.summary: Get list of setups used by the user
Get list of brokers used by the user
Get list of account identifiers used by the user

post.description: Pre-validates a CSV file to detect broker format mismatch and provide file analysis

tradeIds.description: Array of trade IDs to delete
Array of trade IDs to add tags to

tags.description: Array of tag names to add

post.summary: Add a fill (execution) to an existing trade
post.description: Appends a single execution to a trade. The trade's entry/exit price, quantity, P&L, and open/closed status are recalculated automatically from all fills. Use with shell trades or to add partial fills to any trade.

get.summary: Get user's quality grading weight preferences

gap.description: Gap from previous close weight percentage (0-100)

put.summary: Update user's quality grading weight preferences

gap.description: Gap from previous close weight percentage

get.summary: Get API usage statistics for current user

delete.description: Permanently delete the authenticated user's account. Requires password confirmation.

get.description: Returns daily P&L, cumulative P&L, running max, and drawdown values ordered by trade date. Useful for charting equity drawdown curves.
Returns paginated trades with full filtering support. Supports limit/offset pagination and all standard trade filters (symbol, side, status, date range, etc.).

post.description: Creates a new trade. Supports idempotency via the Idempotency-Key header to safely retry requests without creating duplicates.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate creation on retries (1-255 chars)

post.description: Creates multiple trades in a single request. Returns per-item results with partial failure support. Supports idempotency via header.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate creation on retries

200.description: Bulk creation results with per-item status

put.description: Updates multiple trades in a single request. Each item must include the trade ID.

delete.description: Deletes multiple trades by ID in a single request.

get.description: Returns a compact summary of the user's trading activity including total trades, open trades, total P&L, win rate, and recent activity.
Returns the most recent trades ordered by entry time descending.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of recent trades to return

get.description: Returns a single trade with all fields including executions and metadata.

put.description: Updates an existing trade. Only provided fields are updated.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a trade and all associated data.

tags.name: Instrument Templates
tags.description: Reusable templates for futures and options contract details

tags.name: Tags
tags.description: User tag management for trade organization
